name: American International Holdings Corp.
summary: American International Holdings Corp., through its subsidiaries, provides physician supervised, medical spa, and wellness services in the United States and internationally. Its products and services include stem cell therapy, anti-aging, weight loss, skin rejuvenation, laser hair removal, vampire facial, body contouring, laser vein removal, cellulite reduction, stretch mark reduction, acne and acne scar reduction, testosterone replacement therapy, hair restoration, botox and fillers, facials and peels, weight loss solutions, and IV therapies. The company, through its monthly subscription based online telemedicine platform, provides customers with access to certified physicians, licensed mental and behavioral health counselors, and therapists; and operates and manages an online platform providing customers with access to life and career coaches through LifeGuru.me. It also provides general contracting and construction services, which cover permitting, roofing, exterior construction or remodeling, interior finish, cabinetry, drywall, plumbing, and electrical for the commercial real estate projects in the United States. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Addison, Texas.
